headline: Netflix Stock Has Soared Since It Walked Away From Warner Bros. Time to Buy?
summary: Management's disciplined decision to walk away from a massive acquisition pleased the market, but has the stock's rebound already priced in the good news?

headline: FCC chair slams broadcasters after Trump disputes reports on Iran-damaged U.S. tankers
summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

headline: Oscars 2026 Prediction Market Preview: Can Sinners Beat One Battle After Another?

headline: Larry Ellison Leaves Hawaii, Declares $173M Florida Compound His Official Residence — Minutes From Trump's Mar-a-Lago
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) co-founder Larry Ellison has moved his tax domicile from Hawaii to Florida. Ellison, who has a reported net worth of $197.5 billion, filed a declaration of domicile in May 2023 in Palm Beach, designating his $173 million Manalapan...

headline: A Paramount-Warner Bros. movie slate could rule the 2027 box office, but is it sustainable?
summary: Paramount CEO David Ellison has said he wants to make 30 movies a year and has franchises like Godzilla-Kong, Superman and Sonic the Hedgehog to lean on.

headline: Paramount Skydance WBD Deal Spurs Job Fears And Valuation Questions
summary: Paramount Skydance has agreed to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery (NasdaqGS:WBD) in a transaction valued at $111 billion, creating one of the largest entertainment groups in Hollywood. Labor unions, including the International Brotherhood of Teamsters, are urging the US Justice Department to block the deal unless binding job protections are included. Regulators and industry insiders are focused on potential workforce cuts, integration of brands such as HBO and CNN, and how combined streaming...
